description: Defines the standard sections for journal entries (journals/YYYY-MM-DD_HH.html). A generator or validator can use this schema to ensure consistency.

sections.name: stream
sections.description: Free-form observations, thoughts, and reflections on the content stream.

sections.name: tensions
sections.description: Specific conflicting arguments or narratives encountered this hour.

sections.name: narrative_patterns
sections.description: Analysis of detected structural narrative patterns, such as 'Threat-Solution' sequences.

sections.name: images
sections.description: Screenshots of notable content, with captions explaining their significance.

sections.name: footnotes
sections.description: An ordered list of source references (e.g., links to tweets or articles).
